events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: isolated (unbonded) metal equipment parts pose a high-risk shock/arc hazard since fault current has no low-impedance return path. Decision is `fail` — bonding per NEC 250.104 (structural steel/piping) and 250.30 (separately derived systems) must be installed and continuity-tested before energization.
